name: Fairy From the Painting
overview: It tells the romantic love story of Gu Yan Cheng and Yu Xuan. Gu Yancheng, the heir of the Gu clan group, met Yu Xuan who looked similar to the 'Fairy of the sky' .

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Today! November 17 on iQIYI  | Fairy From the Painting  | 你是人间理想 | iQIYI
